theme.concept: Museum Reading Room & Digital Humanities Lab
theme.tone: Editorial, spacious, elegant, minimal, timeless, calm, accessible, premium.

background.name: Warm Archival Paper
background.usage: Primary page background for the entire application. Provides a tactile, historical paper feel.

secondary.name: Secondary Archival
secondary.usage: Surface backgrounds for archival drawers, search bars, transcript sections, and subtle hover states.

text.name: Ink Black
text.usage: Primary text color for headings, body, and UI icons. Do not use pure black (#000).

accent_1.name: Muted Olive
accent_1.usage: Secondary buttons, subtle highlights, metadata tags, and active states.

accent_2.name: Muted Gold
accent_2.usage: Primary action elements, highlight text, featured record borders, and special icon accents.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tight leading-none font-serif
scale.archive_id: text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.1em] uppercase font-mono text-[#59604C]

rules: Use Cormorant Garamond strictly for all structural headings.
Use IBM Plex Mono exclusively for Archive IDs, timestamps, and exact metadata values.
Never center-align large blocks of text; stick to left-alignment to respect editorial reading patterns.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Generous and asymmetrical. Use padding scales like p-8, p-12, p-16, and p-24 to create breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.container: Max-width containers (max-w-7xl) centered on the page, with heavy horizontal padding on mobile (px-6).

grids.collections: Bento-style editorial grid. Mix tall portraits with wide landscape spans. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12.
grids.archive_viewer: Split screen layout: large image viewer on one side (col-span-8), sticky metadata and details on the other (col-span-4).

layout_and_spacing.borders: Use sharp, 1px solid borders border-[#E8E2D8] or border-[#222222]/10. NO rounded corners greater than rounded-sm (2px max).

archival_drawers.description: Collection items should look like physical archive drawers or editorial features, NOT standard web cards.
archival_drawers.styles: Flat backgrounds (bg-transparent or bg-[#E8E2D8]), 1px sharp borders, no shadows, hover effects should be subtle image scaling or border darkening.

buttons.primary: Sharp edges, flat bg-[#B89B60] text-white hover:bg-[#222222] transition-colors duration-300 px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: Sharp edges, flat bg-transparent border border-[#222222] text-[#222222] hover:bg-[#E8E2D8] px-6 py-3

audio_player.styles: Minimalist. Avoid default HTML5 audio player. Use a clean play/pause button (lucide-react), a 1px progress line, and mono timestamps.

navigation.styles: Solid or blur background. NEVER use completely transparent backgrounds over imagery to ensure accessibility. bg-[#F7F5F0]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E8E2D8].

hero_section.overlay: Maximum bg-black/30. Ensure text readability through subtle text-shadows if needed. Text should be minimal and elegant.

motion.philosophy: Calm, slow, and intentional. Simulates turning pages or pulling out a drawer.
motion.transitions: Use duration-500 or duration-700 for page transitions and image fades.
motion.hover_states: Do not use bouncing or rapid scales. Use subtle color shifts or slow opacity changes.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG AA standards, especially over the warm background.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, audio controls, archive links) MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute.
accessibility.screen_readers: Provide aria-labels for audio controls and image viewers.

media_and_imagery.guidelines: Images are the core of the archive. Never stretch. Use object-cover for grids, object-contain for the archive viewer.

lal_bagh_collection.description: Vintage historical objects and room setup

voices_portrait_1.description: Portrait of older Indian man (Hrishchand Mishra)

voices_portrait_2.description: Portrait of older Indian woman (oral history subject)

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a production-quality digital archive. Treat this like an application for a renowned museum.
Import Cormorant Garamond, Inter, and IBM Plex Mono via Google Fonts in index.html.
Do NOT use typical SaaS Shadcn components (no thick borders, no heavy shadows, no rounded corners). If using Shadcn, override styles to be sharp (rounded-none), flat, and minimal.
In the App.js/index.js, ensure the global background color is #F7F5F0 and text is #222222.
Do not center align paragraphs or text blocks; left-align to respect editorial typography rules.
Do not use AI assistant Emoji characters (like 🤖, 📚, 🏛️) as icons. Use lucide-react or phosphor-icons.
Implement the 'Voices' feature with a custom audio player UI (do not use default browser <audio> UI).
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but avoid excessive drop-shadows. Rely on 1px borders and slight background shifts (#F7F5F0 vs #E8E2D8) instead.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead. But keep them slow and elegant.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, custom cursors, and selection states separate good from extraordinary.
NEVER use placeholder URLs via.placeholder.com. Always use the provided image URLs.
